sunken_tome.name: The Sunken Tome of Vael'Zhur
sunken_tome.description: The archmage's magnum opus, bound in drowned leather and cold to the touch. Its pages whisper. To read it is to learn the soul-draining art Vael'Zhur bound his life to — and to risk what he became.

warding_key_i.name: Warding-Key Fragment I
warding_key_i.description: A wedge of black glass etched with a binding-rune, warm where the others are cold. One of three that seal Vael'Zhur's sanctum.

warding_key_ii.name: Warding-Key Fragment II
warding_key_ii.description: A second shard of the drowning-ward, its rune half-drowned in verdigris. The Reedmarsh goblins kept it as a totem.

warding_key_iii.name: Warding-Key Fragment III
warding_key_iii.description: The last fragment of the ward, given up by the marsh-witch Ysolde. Held to the light, its rune completes the others.

warding_key.name: The Warding Key
warding_key.description: The three fragments made whole — a key of black glass that can open Vael'Zhur's sanctum without waking its traps, or bind the lich back into his drowning-sleep.

drowned_lantern.name: The Drowned Lantern
drowned_lantern.description: A storm-lantern of green glass that burns underwater, its flame fed by the Vault itself. It throws back the dark of the flooded halls.

watchman_signet.name: Watchman's Signet
watchman_signet.description: A tarnished ring bearing the old watch's tower sigil.

vigil_candle.name: Vigil Candle Stub
vigil_candle.description: A candle burned to a thumb's width, kept like a treasure.

charred_doll.name: Charred Doll
charred_doll.description: A child's doll, scorched down one side. Someone loved it.

princes_letter.name: Merchant Prince's Letter
princes_letter.description: A commission letter sealed in violet wax, never collected.

festival_ribbon.name: Faded Festival Ribbon
festival_ribbon.description: A ribbon from the great festival, colors gone soft with years.

goblin_warhorn.name: Cracked Goblin War-Horn
goblin_warhorn.description: Split down the middle — blown once too hard at the last raid.

cracked_riverstone.name: Cracked Riverstone
cracked_riverstone.description: A river-polished stone split by the sun of the dry year.

druid_charm.name: Druid's Woven Charm
druid_charm.description: Knotted reeds and green stone; it smells of deep forest.
